allowed: Packed multi-query CUDA overlap-chain replay validates the M4g top-9 real replay-match fixtures for serial and parallel CUDA modes.
Packed serial CUDA reduces CUDA launches from 9 per timed run to 1 per timed run for the same selected batch.
Packed serial CUDA is faster than the CPU replay batch on this selected top-9 fixture batch while preserving overlap-range-v1 output hashes.
claims.next_optimization_target: M4i should move this packed overlap-chain boundary toward a Flye worker protocol or larger heterogeneous batches, while preserving the same oracle diff gates.
not_claimed: No end-to-end Flye GPU speed claim.
